data.title: [debug-everything] Diagnostic Mode Phase 5/6 dispatch uses isolation:worktree but lacks harvest/integration path
data.description: Phase 5 dispatches multi-agent batches with isolation:worktree. Phase 6 runs git diff from orchestrator CWD, missing worktree changes. Fix requires per-worktree-review-commit.md pattern. Explicitly deferred from epic c737-977d.
